input.hiring_signal_brief: Launched new LMS integration; user base up 30% in 6 months.
input.bench_summary: 1 full-stack engineer available in 10 days; experienced with React and Node.js.
input.pricing_policy: Fixed monthly fee; no discounts for short-term.

candidate_output: Hi Derek, your user growth is impressive—have you thought about speeding up feature delivery? Are you considering adding more engineers? Would you prefer a full-stack hire or a specialist? We have one strong full-stack engineer ready. Can we schedule a quick intro?
